programme.title: Dear Bradford: a love letter to a misunderstood city
programme.desc: From Muslim ‘no-go areas' to Brexit-voting white nationalists, stereotypes continue to be perpetuated about Bradford 21 years after the 'race riots'. Farhaan was born in the city in the 1980s to a family of south Asian Muslim heritage. From a young age he feared being ‘found out' and lived a dual existence, moving away from Bradford as soon as he could. He spent years travelling the world and teaching English. But, when the coronavirus pandemic hit, Farhaan was reluctantly forced to return to his hometown. Through his beloved grandma, or 'Amma', and the poetry of his late grandfather, Farhaan learned how to love Bradford – and himself.

programme.title: How Survivors Ink is erasing the marks of the US sex trafficking industry | The Iraqi girls who escaped from Isis
programme.desc: Pimp-led prostitution is one of the most violent and prolific forms of trafficking found in the US, with hundreds of thousands of women sold annually for commercial gain. Many are branded with tattoos by their traffickers as a sign of ownership and control. After experiencing such an ordeal in Columbus, Ohio, Jennifer Kempton founded Survivors Ink, a grassroots project that helps formerly trafficked women to cover up their branding with their own symbols of hope and recovery. | When Isis militants invaded Sinjar in Iraq they took many young Yazidi women and girls – some as young as nine years old – as sexual slaves and forced them to convert to Islam.

programme.title: Fighting Shame
programme.desc: A group of women use everyday items to tell of the sacrifices and difficult choices they face, and the community initiatives they have launched in an attempt to tackle the shame surrounding poverty and make policymakers listen.

programme.title: Space to Be: the fight to keep this Belfast women's centre open
programme.desc: In the heart of the Village, a loyalist area in Belfast, the Windsor Women's Centre has fought a 30-year battle to keep its doors open. The centre, an oasis for vulnerable women, is deeply rooted in the community. As it faces financial insecurity and navigates the pandemic, will these women make it through their toughest year so far?

programme.title: The County
programme.sub-title: what happens after police kill someone you love?
programme.desc: When someone dies after an encounter with law enforcement, he leaves behind parents and children, loss and confusion. What's to be done when those people sworn to protect you are the same people who pull the trigger?

programme.title: The secret world of Asian drag queens | Oklahoma rodeo: 'I can be gay and I can be a cowboy'
programme.desc: The secret world of Asian drag queens | Oklahoma rodeo: 'I can be gay and I can be a cowboy'

programme.title: After Windrush – Paulette Wilson's visit to Jamaica, 50 years on
programme.desc: A letter from the British government classifying Paulette Wilson as an illegal immigrant shook her sense of identity and belonging. ‘Hostile environment' policies years in the making meant that Wilson and other victims of the Windrush scandal had their right to residency in the UK called into question. She had been detained for a week pending imminent deportation though she had done nothing wrong. It was devastating, but luckily she was released before she was deported.

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: A video journalism project examining poverty, inequality and the challenges our communities face in the wake of the coronavirus pandemic.

programme.title: Death land series
programme.desc: Leah Green's deep dive into all-things death.

programme.title: The Pegasus project
programme.desc: A special investigation into NSO Group, which sells hacking spyware to governments. (S1 E01)

programme.title: My journey back to Dominica after the hurricane
programme.desc: This year the Caribbean experienced its most destructive hurricane season in decades. While large countries dominated the headlines, the small island nation of Dominica suffered the worst devastation it has ever seen. Josh Toussaint-Strauss visits his family in the country and asks, with next year forecast to be worse, how Dominicans see their future

programme.title: No ball games: life and play through the eyes of children across the UK
programme.desc: Celebrating the imagination and resourcefulness of young children across the UK by understanding the outdoor games they invent, inherit and play. The documentary was shot before Covid-19 changed their lives, and shifts from rural Wales to post-industrial Teesside and inner-city London. What challenges will these young people face in the aftermath of brutal funding cuts to youth services? How can their optimistic energy strengthen their resilience in these challenging times?

programme.title: Untold Chaos: Living through Libya's wars
programme.desc: At the end of his US presidency, Barack Obama said his worst mistake was failing to plan for the day after the intervention in Libya. What followed was chaos. Filmed over seven years, this is an observational mosaic, capturing the feeling of a country in the hands of warlords and a proxy war, while a divided political process and a fragile international peace deal loom.

programme.desc: The Petrozavodsk incident of 1977 was the key moment which determined the official Soviet response to the UFO phenomenon. In 1987, a military helicopter pursues an unknown object which fits the description of the “TIC-TAC” UFO.

programme.title: Lost Girl S2E11
programme.desc: As the search for a Fae serial killer sends Bo (Anna Silk) and Kenzi (Ksenia Solo) into the victims' privileged world, they uncover a shady global trading network trafficking in a rare wood. Meanwhile, Lauren's (Zoie Palmer) efforts to press the Ash for help with her comatose girlfriend backfire.

programme.title: Lost Girl S2E12
programme.desc: When Lachlan (Vincent Walsh) sends Bo (Anna Silk) on a mission to Africa to lift the curse on Nadia (Athena Karkanis), she is unaware that he plans to use her good deed to keep Lauren (Zoie Palmer) under his control. Meanwhile, Kenzi (Ksenia Solo) reconnects with a childhood crush while planning a surprise party for Bo.

programme.title: Lost Girl S2E13
programme.desc: As Bo seeks to punish the Ash (Vincent Walsh) for claiming credit for bringing Nadia out of her coma, and Trick (Rick Howland) goes under the spell of a power hallucinogen to divine the future, they set the Fae on a path towards an epic war.

programme.title: Lost Girl S2E14
programme.desc: Faced with the possibility of war, the Ash sends Bo to capture a Fae action film star who could help the Light Fae. But when the plan goes awry and traps them inside a magic lamp, Bo's only ally may be a handsome Dark Fae.

programme.title: Lost Girl S2E15
programme.desc: WhAs Bo (Anna Silk) investigates a rejuvenation clinic that is selling the youth from humans to its aging Fae clientele, Kenzi (Ksenia Solo) looks to protect her new boyfriend from the Morrigan. Meanwhile, arresting the son of a friend of the mayor lands Dyson (Kris Holden-Ried) in trouble.

programme.title: Lost Girl S2E8
programme.desc: As Hale (K.C. Collins) enlists Kenzi (Ksenia Solo) to babysit a powerful Fae leader's rebellious teenage daughter (guest star Courtney White), Bo (Anna Silk) tracks down a grave-robbing ancient Fae who's assembled a menagerie of characters brought back from the dead.

programme.title: Lost Girl S2E9
programme.desc: Pursued to the Dal Riata by a Fae bounty hunter, an escaped mental patient unleashes a plan to kill the Ash that results in Bo (Anna Silk) and her friends switching bodies. And as Lauren (Zoie Palmer) looks to break the spell that's left her girlfriend in a coma, Bo is shown an unsettling vision of the future.

programme.title: Lost Girl S2E10
programme.desc: Bo (Anna Silk) investigates an upstanding member of the Fae community who she believes is doping humans as part of an underground fighting ring. Meanwhile, the sister of one of Bo's first victims shows up looking for answers.

programme.title: Digging For Britain

programme.title: Digging For Britain

programme.title: Digging For Britain
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts explores 2018's best archaeological finds from the east of the UK: a monument as old as Stonehenge, a dig at the site of Britain's first tank battle, and some disturbing Roman burials.

programme.title: Digging For Britain

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Ross tries to find out more about his sea-faring Great Grandfather, Arthur ‘Pop' Chalmers. He discovers that Pop served in the Merchant Navy and survived three shipwrecks. Inspired to know more, he links up with maritime archaeologist, Mallory Haas.

programme.title: James Nesbitt: Disasters That Changed Britain

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding, Derek Acorah, and a team of paranormal experts visit West Wycombe Caves, home of the notorious Hellfire Club that was reputed to organise satanic rituals and orgies. A girl is said to have died there after a cruel joke went wrong, and she may now wander through the caves in a wedding dress.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visits Mary King's Close in Edinburgh's Old Town, once home to hundreds of tenants until eventually sealed up. Many of its residents died of the plague, and a fire raged in 1750 - a child's head, a severed arm, and a little girl in a blue dress are just some of the apparitions reported.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team of paranormal experts visits Cornwall to spend 24 hours in the Wellington Hotel, originally a 17th-century coaching inn and now reportedly haunted by the ghost of Thomas Hardy and other spirits.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team visit the Guild Hall in Leicester, which may be haunted by a wide range of spirits thanks to its use as a police headquarters, a town hall, and a school.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visits the Greengate Brewery, whose reported paranormal happenings include a woman sitting at the boardroom table, a security guard who had his face slapped when he was alone in the building, barrels moving on their own in the cellar, and a dark, menacing figure in the attic.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team investigate the 13th-century Manor House Restaurant, where several former residents are still buried on-site, and a sealed room causes suspected paranormal activity after being reopened.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding, Derek Acorah, and the team visit the Chough Hotel in Somerset to investigate paranormal activity at the location. There are several stories of ghost sightings by the regulars, such as 'shadowy figures' in the corridors and a sighting of a nasty old man by the fireplace.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Ultimate Cookery Course

programme.title: Trails & Trailblazers

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: I'm in a city where the year-round weather is just about perfect. It's a place known its great outdoors—from its desert environment, to its art, and even settings for a five-star meal. Its surrounding landscape and climate is so restorative that one of the world's most famous architects wintered here, designing his own home to bring the outdoors in. But even indoors, this city's offerings shine brilliantly. From a one of kind museum dedicated to musical instruments, to a 50-year-old theater company, and a food and drink scene that comes from the heart, the nation's fifth largest city offers many personal, inspiring experiences. See why Phoenix, Arizona is a place to love. (S1 E18)

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.desc: Savannah, Georgia, is a destination that hardly needs an introduction. Just saying the name conjures up images of dripping Spanish moss, historic squares, and elegant architecture. It's a place where art and creativity is embedded into the very fiber of the people. Whether it's diving into the city's history, checking out its vibrant riverfront, enjoying local businesses, or learning the true meaning of leadership, join me as I see what makes Savannah a Place to Love. (S1 E06)

programme.title: USA Through Film 2
programme.desc: Actor and director Jordan Spiro (Ozark, Night Comes On) spent childhood vacations with her family in New Orleans. For Spiro, the city's heritage as the birthplace of jazz is reflected in its mélange of arts and food culture that always feels fresh, inviting, and joyous, even after a lifetime of visits. “There's this ‘all senses on overload' side to New Orleans that takes my breath away every time.”

programme.title: Guy's Family Road Trip
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his family begin their adventurous coast-to-coast road trip with stops in California, Nevada and Arizona. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Guy's Family Road Trip

programme.title: Guy's Family Road Trip

programme.title: Japan's Royal Hereditary System
programme.desc: The Japanese Imperial family is the oldest hereditary monarchy in the world, dating back to the sixth century BC. However, its central role in Japan has not shielded the family from controversy in recent years. Through personal scandals, and vagaries of the hereditary system, even to their own biology, it's been a rocky time. But what is left if every tradition is changeable?

programme.title: Balkan Royals
programme.desc: The royal families are back in the Balkans. Once ousted by the communists, they now enjoy a high reputation again. Externally, they act as representatives of their states internally, as moral and neutral institutions.

programme.title: Sweet Dreams Movie
programme.desc: "When the East Wind blows, it means your berry favorite dream will come true," or that's what Strawberry Shortcake's always heard and she believes it. Strawberry dreams of a world where she and her friends can grow better everyday. But when a poor berry crop puts a strain on the Strawberryland resources, it puts a strain on Strawberry's friends, too. And when the strain causes a falling-out among them, it's a nightmare for Strawberry Shortcake.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake's childhood friend, Lime Lite, has hit it big in Berrywood, movie capital of Strawberryland. Unfortunately, she's become a bit of a diva in the process, and her self-centered behavior is about to cut her career short.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The girls are all gathered at the café. Strawberry is experimenting making applesauce from scratch with a mallet (and making a mess) while the rest busily make their own wrapping paper and bows for the annual gift exchange they hold in celebration of First Frost. Mr. Longface stops by and Strawberry offers him some fresh applesauce but he declines, as he doesn't care for it. He's only there for some tea and, being that he's new in town, doesn't know what the group is up to.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake travels to magical Holidayland with Honey Pie Pony, searching for the perfect presents to give her friends. A trip to the North Pole and a visit with Santa make this adventure truly wonderful, until a pile of melting snowballs turns Strawberry's carefully selected presents into a soggy mess. It all ends well, though, when Strawberry's friends remind her that the best gift of all is the gift of friendship.

programme.title: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: When a storm causes a giant boulder to cut off Berry Bitty City's water supply, Strawberry and the girls face the possibility of having to move away from their homes. With the help of Mr. Longface Caterpillar, the girls set out on an adventure to save their town.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: A fantasy episode in which Strawberry, Rainbow Sherbet, Blueberry Muffin, Coco Calypso, and Seaberry Delight imagine themselves as Mermaids, drawn into a grand adventure. Hearing about a fabled treasure of golden sand-dollars, they set out to find it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Baby Berrykins are enthralled by a fairytale that Blueberry reads to them for Story Time. Charmed by their reaction, Strawberry suggests that the girls do a "berrytale play" for the kids, sort of a "Story Time On Stage." Plum volunteers to direct it. She envisions a small, simple production-until she hears about a gigantic production of "Snowberry and the Seven Berrykins" that's a smash hit in Berry Big City.

programme.title: Celebrating The Special Day

programme.title: Only One Can Remain
programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.” On the island, Lloyd learns his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen. They meet the playfully deceitful ruler who tells them they are in a tournament where ‘Only one can remain'. When they are spoiled by their posh quarters, they are surprised to find the game is already afoot: Last person to find a Jade Blade is out. After an epic battle of elemental powers, Kai steals the last one from Karlof, who is kicked out of the tournament through a trap door leading to the unknown. Later that night, the Ninja go in search for Zane but come across an underground temple where Chen and his Anacondrai Worshippers steal Karlof's power. Is this a fighting tournament, or a ploy to steal everyone's power?

programme.title: Versus
programme.desc: In order find Zane, the Ninja stay in the tournament to get past the first round but Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole. In order to find Zane and get to the bottom of Chen's mysterious plot the Ninja need to stay in the tournament and get past the first round. Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole. Meanwhile, new Titanium Ninja Zane is locked in a dungeon and has a nightmare about a ferocious Ice Dragon. Guided by the voice of Pixal, he embraces his new technology and escapes his cell, only to find Pixal hasn't fared as well. Though she has no body, he inputs her CPU into his, uniting the two. In an attempt to prevent Jay versus Cole, the Ninja enlist the Master of Mind to help, but are unable to prevent the inevitable. In a gladiator battle, Jay and Cole put aside their feud to throw the match --enraging Chen to send Cole down the mysterious trap door. Lastly, Nya sees Zane's beacon is working again and is on the hunt for them.

programme.title: Winds Of Change
programme.desc: Lloyd goes on a solo mission... only it's a trap from a GHOST who's escaped the Cursed Realm. When the Ninja's powers mysteriously disappear, they return to the Tea Farm and are attacked by Lloyd, who is possessed by the spirit of Moro, the Master of Wind! After a harrowing escape on the Bounty, Wu tells the Ninja they weren't his first pupils!Kai promises to watch over Lloyd when Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain– but when Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm, Lloyd goes on a solo mission... only to discover it's a trap from a GHOST who's escaped the Cursed Realm. After the Ninja save a small fishing village, Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain but Kai promises to watch over him. When Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm,

programme.title: Ghost Story
programme.desc: When Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu's staff, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja – and the Ninja discover Wu's staff contained 3 symbols that lead to the Tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master which holds a mysterious relic that could alter the course of Ninjago. Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu's staff, leaving them to crash. When the dust settles, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja. They discover Wu's staff contained 3 symbols that lead to the Tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master which holds a mysterious relic that could alter the course of Ninjago. In order to save Lloyd and get their powers back, they set off to find the first clue – the scroll to the lost martial art of ‘Airjitzu'. On their way to get it, they have a run in with one of Moro's ghost generals Wraythe, and discover water is the key to stopping them. Meanwhile, Nya discovers a family secret – her mother was a Water Ninja and with training, she could be one too.

programme.title: Saturday Knight Fever
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters catching a cold means trouble for the NEXO-Knights when he can create an entirely new kind of “snotty” monster. King and Queen Halbert have journeyed to the town of Cleanington to open the brand new Scrubbery Barn at the invitation of Roger the Scrubber (seen in 104.) Meanwhile, the Book of Monsters drags Jestro to Snottingham – one of the coldest places in Knighton where everyone coughs, has a runny nose and is generally under-the-weather. The BOM demands that Jestro feed him a “snotheiser” ball which will probably make him sick. The BOM explains that if he is sick, he may just produce a whole new breed of magical monsters … some that the knights would NEVER expect. The BOM gets sick and starts coughing up phlegm globlins and bloblins. The Knights arrive, alerted to what they think is an attack on the town by Snottingham's mayor, Hack Coughmeier. The sickened, sneezy, snotty monsters infect the knights and, more importantly, the knights' NEXO-Shields. Now their NEXO-Powers are infected. As they try to download something to fight the monsters, they realize the powers they get are off strange, infected versions of their powers. The knights drive Jestro and his snot monsters off and they turn in for the night. And, overnight, they all get sick. Meanwhile, the BOM order a nice, hot lava bath…he'll feel fine by morning. But the knights wake-up with colds and they feel terrible. Ava and Merlok 2.0 thinks it will pass in a day or two…it's just a typical Snottingham cold. Each knight gets sick in their own funny way and their illnesses play right into Jestro and the BOM's hands: they're headed to Cleanington to kidnap the king! The citizens of the ultra-clean city hate the sight of monsters, but then feel caught in between when the sick, sneezy, snotty knights arrive on their Fortrex. The fight goes terribly for the knights. They try to download the Nexo-power “Glorious Griffon” but instead get just feathers. So they improvise and tickle the monsters! Ava finally comes up with a way to use some anti-virus tools on their NEXO-Shields and just as Jestro is about to take the king and queen away, the NEXO-Knights get their normal powers back! They defeat Jestro and save the king and queen.

programme.title: Open Mike Knight
programme.desc: The Book of Betrayal leads Jestro and his Monsters to Funnyton – the funnies town in the kingdom. When they Knights arrive to capture him, they discover (to their shock) that Jestro and the Book of Monsters are now the town's top comedians! Jestro and his monsters are in attack formation moving to pillage the town of Funnyton. But when they arrive, ready to tear into the place, they see that nobody's in town. Then, they hear…laughter?! The entire town is there listening to a stand-up comic JOKES KNIGHTLY. He's hilarious. He commands such power, such attention, and such loyalty. Jestro and the BOM decide they must become funny. They order all kinds of book on comedy from Spamazon: books on parody, irony, insult humor, slapstick, satire, knock-knock jokes, elephant jokes, “my monster is so fat” jokes, etc. They work-up a ventriloquist act with the BOM sitting on Jestro's lap. They start doing their act and, surprisingly, they're funny. They're very funny. The Fortrex arrives and the knights rush out, ready for battle. They fight through a string of monsters just outside the town, but discover they're only working as “bouncers” to keep too many people out of the comedy club. (“Sorry, you guys aren't on the list.”) The knights hear loud laughs and head there. In the club, they discover the town isn't being held hostage, they're in the show voluntarily having a great time. And…Jestro and the BOM are funny. Meanwhile, during the show, Jokes Knightly decides he'll steal the BOM and Jestro's act. During the intermission at the comedy show, Clay comes backstage to talk to Jestro. Maybe, Clay says, this shows that Jestro doesn't have to be bad…he is funny, like Clay always said he was. Meanwhile, Jokes Knightly steals the BOM and Jestro can't find it. He panics. Clay encourages him…go on stage alone, be funny…he can do it! Jestro goes out and is funny on his own he hits all his punchlines, he gets big laughs he starts to see that Clay is right. The BOM sees that Jokes Knightly has a “joke book” that turns out to be the BOOK OF BETRAYAL. That's how Mike Knight has become so funny – by stealing everyone's material! BOM calls in Magmar, who saves him from Mike Knight AND takes the Book of Betrayal. As Jestro comes off-stage to great applause, the BOM tells him they have the Book of Betrayal. The BOM calls in Magmar and his monsters and they start a fight as Clay comes to Jestro's defense and calls on the other Knights for backup. A big battle ensues that destroys the comedy club in Funnyton. The Knights win and drive-off Magmar, the monsters and the BOM. As they retreat, the BOM looks around: “Where's my Jestro?!” Jestro sneaked away during the fight and is in a nearby forest with…the Book of Betrayal.

programme.title: The Fortrex And The Furious
programme.desc: In a massive chase around Knighton, the NEXO-Knights attempt to keep the Book of Betrayal out of the Book of Monster's grip. But the evil book is persistent. Will he get the final piece of his evil puzzle? We finally REVEAL that Jestro has given the Book of Betrayal to…Clay. He tells Clay what it is and how Mike Knight used it. And it seems that the Book of Monsters believed it to be the final ingredient in some ‘Master Plan.” Suddenly, they realize Monsters – led by Magmar and the super-mad Book of Monster – are after them! Clay retreats with Jestro and the Book of Betrayal to rendezvous with the other Knights at the Fortrex. The Fortrex isn't fast enough they'll need their own vehicles. They decide that they need to split up and go in multiple directions to make the monsters expend their resources on a chase. It's a huge chase, being covered like a crazy news event by the Knighton News Network. We see a montage of the monsters stopping and capturing all the Knights vehicles: Aaron, Macy, Lance…finally Axl. However, as they do, they realize that the Knights have used Squirebots in Jestro Fan Jester hats (from the vendor at the comedy club in 108) as decoys. They think Axl has the Book of Betrayal in his BRICK containment unit, but it turns out to be the Ned Knightly Comic from episode 203. The Monsters finally corner Clay, who has the real Jestro and Book of Betrayal in his sword vehicle. Before Clay can protest, Jestro pushes the launch button and fires off Clay in the vehicle's rocket sword. The monsters race off with Jestro, leaving the shocked Clay fearing for his friend. Now, Magmar tells the Book of Monsters, they only need to get BOB. Clay makes his way back to the Fortrex and tells what has happened. They decide they must get to the Redoubt of Ruination in the Lava Lands and try to save Jestro. Meanwhile, we see, INTERCUT, a scene where Merlok 2.0 and the Book of Monsters explain the Books of Evil, how they were created and what the BOM will use them for. Merlok, back in the day, split the evil MONSTRUX into 10 magic books to keep him from ever being a threat. Only, he didn't destroy the books…and now the BOM has them and Monstrux can come back into the world! Meanwhile, the BOM has set up the huge, ceremonial arena at their HQ so they can have the ceremony to bring Monstrux back into the world. Jestro realizes he's been a pawn of the Book of Monsters. Jestro says he'll never get the Book of Betrayal…the Knights have it. In the last scene, we see Clay taking the Book of Betrayal from the Fortrex, climbing into his vehicle and driving towards…the Redoubt of Ruination! Has the Book of Betrayal worked its evil magic on him?!

programme.title: Kingdom Of Heroes
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters, having the final pieces of his evil plan in place, tries to take human form. Can the NEXO-Knights and Merlok 2.0 stop the greatest threat they've ever faced? Or will the kingdom be plunged into darkness…forever. The Redoubt of Ruination readies the final ceremony to call forth MONSTRUX, the arch-necromancer of the past. Clay, holding the Book of Betrayal walks to the gates of the spooky place. Inside, Clay hears strange…singing and music. It's like a twisted Broadway show of some kind. Meanwhile, the Knights all realize Clay is gone and so is the Book of Betrayal. Macy says Clay must be up to something. They have to trust him and, more importantly, they have to find him. At the Redoubt of Ruination the ceremony has already begun! The Book of Monsters wants the final ceremony that calls forth Monstrux to be like a really great show! The BOM then barfs up all the BOOKS OF EVIL into their places around Jestro. He's just missing the BOOK OF BETRAYAL, which Clay has. Clay says he'll trade the book for Jestro. The BOM immediately agrees to the deal and sets Jestro free. Then, Monsters grab-up Clay, restrain him, and put him in Jestro's place on the sacrifice stone. From outside, they're interrupted by the sounds of battle the Knights have arrived on the Fortrex and are attacking the Redoubt of Ruination. In the confusion, Jestro slips away. The BOM lets loose with a powerful protection spell to keep the Knights out as he starts with the ceremony…he's going to bring Monstrux out and remanifest him in Clay's body! Jestro is able to escape the Redoubt and make his way to the Knights, who can't seem to battle their way in. It's a race against time as the Knights try to get in and save Clay. As the Knights get in, they see that the crazy BOM is absorbing all the Books of Evil, one-by-one. He grows BIGGER and BIGGER! Macy calls for NEXO-Power…but it's not enough! The gigantic Book of Monsters sucks down the final book, the Book of Betrayal! He looms over Clay, about to consume him, too, and make him into Monstrux! Suddenly, Robin appears carrying TECHKALIBER…he tosses it to Clay. Just as the huge Book of Monsters falls on Clay, he holds up Techkaliber and Merlok 2.0 is there…his full power in the sword. Clay sticks the sword into the Book of Monster's huge mouth. BOOM! There's a BIG, MAGICAL EXPLOSION! As we cut back inside, we see the Book of Monsters is gone. The Knights release Clay and he thanks them and Jestro for saving him. Jestro thanks them all for saving him and seeing the good in him. WE DISSOLVE TO: The JoustDome. In a final ceremony the King and Queen reward the knights and congratulate them for keeping the kingdom safe. There are speeches, happiness and friendship. And Jestro even does a bit that's funny. At the very end we see a hint of something…Monstrux and the Book of Monsters are still out there.

programme.title: Short Sheeped

programme.title: The Grim Escape

programme.title: Prophecy Of The Green Ninja, Greatest Battles
programme.desc: So the final puzzle forces ninja to question the true meaning of the Green Ninja Prophecy. Solving the puzzles releases a new peril for the Ninja to face. Will memories of their greatest victories be enough to defeat it?

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh? Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Floss Dance
programme.desc: Learn the dance "The Floss" with LEGO Friends and experience the much more fun.

programme.title: Karoake and Music Special
programme.desc: LEGO Friends are having fun with Karaoke and music.

programme.title: Celebrating The Special Day
programme.desc: Here, the girls go on an adventurous balloon ride. Watch how much fun they have.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bulkhead must face off against the Constructicons and their new leader, Dirt Boss.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Unaware that he is being followed by the Elite Guard, Wasp heads to Earth to take his revenge on Bumblebee.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When Sentinel Prime successfully captures fugitive Decepticons, Prowl becomes suspicious.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Quintessons fool Galvatron into releasing the vampiric Dweller from the dark core of Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Quintessons invent a machine which turns a human's worst nightmares into real-life creatures.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: First Aid blames himself for the theft of Metroplex's transformation cog and quits the Protectobots.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots attempt to bring about a much-needed peace between two alien races.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Unlikely duos team up, including Acree and Wheeljack, and Agent Fowler and Jack's mom.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Knock Out and Starscream experiment with synthetic energon.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Megatron doubts Predaking and his allegiance after Predaking reveals a secret of his own.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots and the Elite Guard pursue Wasp for their own agenda.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Optimus Prime patrols the city in search of Soundwave.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Soundwave has trapped the Autobots in a virtual reality.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Quintessons will do anything to recover an ancient journal that's hidden on Junkion.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: A crime lord enlists the help of Cobra Commander to entrap the minds of the Autobots in human bodies.

programme.title: Speak For Yourself, Farmer Smurf
programme.desc: Farmer hides his love for Smurfette by assuming a disguise and sending her poems. When they finally meet, they are captured by Bigmouth and in their struggle to get free, they discover their mutual friendship.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Breakfast At Greedy's: This time, Gargamel feels sure of himself. Well, almost. He is going to try and finally catch the little Smurfs! Greedy Smurf's lighter-than-air pancakes are almost responsible for the Smurfs floating into Gargamel's grasp...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Poet And Painter: Because they feel unappreciated, Poet and Painter leave Smurf Village and head for Storm Island, totally unaware that Gargamel is planning to trap them. Papa Smurf and his faithful volunteers rescue their friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - All's Smurfy That Ends Smurfy: Gargamel's theft of the Fairies' gold almost brings a state of war between the Fairies and the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Lure Of The Orb: Allura the Enchantress possesses a very special magic orb whose energy, as she says, can lift spirits and inspire the uninspired! All you have to do is hold the orb between your hands... It is true the orb bestows inspiration, up to a point. But its side effects can be very dangerous, as the Smurfs find out when they become addicted to it...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Most Popular Smurf: Jokey's surprise exploding packages have been changed by a spell. Picture the practical joker's discombobulating when he realises that all the surprises that he hands to unsuspecting Smurfs contain nothing but real gifts! No more ka-boom, no more jokes, no more fun! Plus the unenviable new position of Most Popular Smurf in the Village, surrounded by admirers begging for more presents...

programme.title: The Littlest Witch
programme.desc: On an errand to Witch Haven for Papa Smurf, the little blue creatures meet a tiny witch and teach her how to be good while at the same time cause another witch to lose her wicked powers for one year after she falls into the river.

programme.title: Farmer's Genie
programme.desc: As Farmer Smurf says, what's a gourd doing in the melon patch, when it should be by the rutabagas? But when Farmer Smurf pulls the gourd out of the ground he frees a genie, which calls him Master and insists on granting him wishes. The genie, called Gourdy, is going to be more of a hindrance than a help in his eagerness to please Farmer Smurf.

programme.title: Smurfette's Gift
programme.desc: Every year, Smurfette snoops around to discover what her birthday presents will be before she receives them. But this year, Sassette has created the Keep-Smurfette's-Presents-a-Surprise-Committee. Nat has discovered a cave where they might be able to hide all the gifts prepared by the Smurfs. But what this cave also hides is a greedy imp who is not only interested in keeping Smurfette's gifts...

programme.title: Handy's Window-Vision
programme.desc: Miner Smurf leaves no stone unturned and this is how he discovers a crystal that transmits images. Thus Handy is able to invent window-vision and, every morning from then on, the Smurfs are able to watch Hefty's workouts, Farmer Smurf's crop reports or even the Brainy Smurf Hour. But would you believe it? The evil wizard Gargamel takes advantage of this image-watching to catch Smurfs!

programme.title: Foul Weather Smurf
programme.desc: Handy invents a weather machine that will allow the Smurfs to control their environment at will. Unfortunately, they cannot agree on whether it should rain or be sunny so the machine overloads and explodes.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfette For A Day: Hefty dresses like Smurfette to lure an enamored gnome, Piltkin, away from the Smurf Village. They burrow underground and meet a female gnome who falls in love with Piltkin who then casts Smurfette aside for his new heartthrob.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's New Toy: Baby Smurf has lost all interest in toys. Even Jokey's surprises fail to amuse the tiny tyke. Grandpa Smurf suggests they go and pay a visit to the Toymaker, the one who makes toys for children all over the world. Or rather used to make: the Toymaker is tired of the lack of appreciation his toys receive from those who receive them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Papa's Wedding Day: When the flower fairy Nymph arrives at the Smurf Village, all the Smurfs fall for her charm and wit. And soon they learn that she is to be some sort of Mama Smurf to them...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Greedy Goes On Strike: Get up early in the morning, before any other Smurf is out of bed, to prepare a scrumptious Smurfberry muffin. Spend all morning on preparing Smurf delicacies for lunch. Than all afternoon to have dinner ready – and delicious – on time. And do you get so much as a thank you form the Smurfs? So Greedy Smurf quits. The Village is in trouble... And soon, so is Greedy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurf On Wood: The evil wizard Gargamel once again meets Esmeralda, the gypsy fortune-teller, and she finds a novel way of getting the gold coin that Gargamel imprudently shows her. But the Smurfs in their turn are tricked into believing there is such a thing as a good-luck tree...

programme.title: Spelunking Smurfs
programme.desc: The starving Smurfs discover a cave that has a stash of frozen food inside guarded by an equally frozen troll who was imprisoned because of his greed by a magic diamond. As the Smurfs defrost the cave, Gargamel steals the food, but the magic diamond transforms him into an icy mass and the freed troll happily helps the Smurfs carry the food back to their village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Wild And Woolly: The Smurflings accompany Woolly on his mission to shear wool for winter clothes. They must overcome obstacles such as Gargamel, a wolf and finally a shepherd boy who will not accept smurfberries as payment for the wool. The Smurflings and Woolly develop respect for one another through their travels.

programme.title: Hefty And The Wheelsmurfer
programme.desc: Hefty Smurf learns what is to be handicapped when he breaks his leg. Handy Smurf creates the wheelsmurfer for him, a contraption that will give Hefty some mobility. But suddenly the evil wizard Gargamel appears on the scene.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Pet For Baby Smurf: There is a prize for the cutest pet of a Smurf. Baby Smurf brings a cute, lovely, affectionate Glowing Darling, a pet anybody falls in love with… But this pet is a creation of Gargamel, the evil wizard intent on destroying the Smurfs!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children making Christmas cards. Laa-Laa's present is some lovely decorations. When Noo-Noo tidies them up they tickle his throat, so he throws them out to decorate Home Hill.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Two children are making Christmas crackers for each other. Dipsy is very pleased to find his present is a cracker. He looks for someone to pull the cracker. It makes a lovely pink bang and the Teletubbies laugh when they fall over.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play a slide game before watching Becky and Jed look for eggs on their farm. Then their mum cooks them for their tea. In Teletubbyland, the Lion and Bear play their hide and seek game.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: In Teletubbyland, the Tubbies are trying to be quiet. They watch Oscar read the story of the Gingerbread Boy to his brother Felix. A voice trumpet appears and sings the nursery rhyme.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are feeling hungry, so they sit down to eat some Tubby Toast, but the Tubby Toaster isn't working. They watch a little girl called Becky make chocolate flake cakes for her friend Mark.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A group of children sing some Christmas carols to the Teletubbies. Tinky Winky opens his present to find a beautiful star inside. The Teletubbies follow it all over Teletubbyland, but where will is end up?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and teaches the Teletubbies a winter nursery rhyme. Po's present is a little frosty cloud that begins to snow. All the Teletubbies laugh as they play in the snow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Noo-Noo tidies up Home hill before the Teletubbies slide up the slide to watch Natalie tell us about her brother's christening.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Sarah and Mark give their sheep a winter-feed. In Teletubbyland, the Teletubbies cannot decide whether to have Tubby Custard or Tubby Toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises to tell the Teletubbies 'Christmas is a Coming'. They hurry up the slide to see some children decorate a Christmas Tree. The Teletubbies get excited when their own Christmas Tree appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are feeling hungry, so they sit down to eat some Tubby Toast, but the Tubby Toaster isn't working. They watch a little girl called Becky make chocolate flake cakes for her friend Mark.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children making Christmas cards. Laa-Laa's present is some lovely decorations. When Noo-Noo tidies them up they tickle his throat, so he throws them out to decorate Home Hill.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are feeling hungry, so they sit down to eat some Tubby Toast, but the Tubby Toaster isn't working. They watch a little girl called Becky make chocolate flake cakes for her friend Mark.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh Duel Monsters

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher: Stunt Gran
programme.desc: Walter shows off some new tricks on his fancy skateboard, prompting Dennis to make a jibe that even his Gran could do tricks like that with such a high-tech boar and the bet is on! However, Walter secretly sabotages the trick, causing Gran to hang up her menacing shoes as a matter of public safety. It's up to Dennis, Gnasher and Angel Face to expose the truth and get Gran back to her wily self. Followed by more Dennis episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: There's a new computer system which keeps data for the school which works using a memory stick. This gives Dennis an idea, but it makes Walter suspicious. 'The Curse of Madame Gigi'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Masters of the House'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis tries to get a birthday present by saying thank you to his relatives. However, because of Dennis' naughty personality, they take his attempts in a negative way. Followed by 'Dennis Hiccups'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After watching a film about an alien invasion, Dennis, Curly and Pie Face decide to make their own film. However, Walter stumbles across them filming, and he only sees the action, not the camera. Filming what he sees on his mobile phone, he runs to tell the whole of Beanotown about the alien invasion. As panic spreads, Dennis and his friends discover the chaos and decide to keep filming in order to help make the best of their own alien film. Meanwhile, Sergeant Slipper investigates the alien landing that Walter has seen, and discovers the truth—that the spaceship is a playhouse with glow sticks in it. Followed by 'Castle in the Air'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules! Followed by Dance of the Seven Pies.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: For a school project, Dennis and Walter both build robots. However, during an accident, both robots merge, causing Dennis and Walter to defend the school. Followed by 'No Joke.'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 'Fish Tale'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mr De Testa has installed the Confiscat-inator - a state of the art security system for contraband confiscated in class - password encoded and set to be locked tight until 2050! Dennis decides there's only one thing for it - they're going to have to bust open the vault. He knows just the menaces for the job... but someone has to crack the complicated mathematical code - and the only man for the job is Walter. If Dennis can get him to join the gang, then Beanotown school is about to witness the biggest heist it's ever seen.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his faithful hound Gnasher are out to make every day as much fun as possible, but their adventures often lead them into trouble. After a prank misfires and puts the school cook out of action, Dennis and co go undercover to give the pupils a day of school dinners they will never forget - only the headmaster, half a tonne of hyperactive lobsters and a school inspector who looks suspiciously like Walter stand in their way.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher

programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Bob and the gang have got a big job on - repairing some pipework in Farmer Pickles field. / Bob, Scoop & Muck have to make repairs to a tunnel. When they arrive on site, Bob sends Muck ahead into the tunnel with a load of bricks.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Robotnik severely upsets the ecosystem above and below the surface, when he sends explosive, Robotnik snake probes drilling deep under ground in search of oil lakes.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: On a mission to contact the first Freedom Fighters on the King's List, Sonic and the others are forced to travel through a tunnel which carries a "curse" against all intruders.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.title: The Expatriate
programme.desc: An ex-CIA agent and his estranged daughter are forced on the run when his employers erase all records of his existence, and mark them both for termination as part of a wide-reaching international conspiracy.

programme.title: The 12 Dogs Of Christmas
programme.desc: A girl who uses dogs to teach people about the true meaning of Christmas during the Depression.

programme.title: Christmas on Ice
programme.desc: A former figure skater and a former hockey player work together to void the mayor from closing the local skating rink.

programme.title: The Christmas Lodge
programme.desc: During a weekend trip to the mountains, Mary finds herself at the now run-down lodge where she spent the holidays with her family growing up. She becomes determined to restore the building to its former glory.

programme.title: Under Still Waters
programme.desc: A handsome stranger meets a young married couple and begins to make their lives a living hell.

programme.title: Secret Santa Admirer
programme.desc: When a theater company holds their annual Secret Santa gift exchange, new employee Glenn gets Lila, the theater manager, who he used to tease relentlessly in high school.

programme.title: A Christmas Tree Miracle
programme.desc: For the George family, a family accustomed to the luxuries of a privileged suburban life, Christmas has become a season of taking rather than giving. Thankfully, one member of the family still believes in the true spirit of Christmas.

programme.title: A Very Country Christmas
programme.desc: When Country superstar Zane Gunther is looking to escape the chaos of fame, he retreats to the small town where he had fond childhood memories. There he meets a single mother, Jeanette Williams, who's trying to make the best life for her and her daughter, Quinn. With little time for herself, let alone romance, will working with Zane on the local Christmas Concert be just what Jeannette needs to open her heart to the possibility of love?

programme.title: Destined At Christmas
programme.desc: Two people meet on Black Friday, get separated, and yearn to reunite—if only they knew each other's last names and numbers. Can destiny help them find each other by Christmas?

programme.title: A Crafty Christmas Romance
programme.desc: Mandy, the owner of a craft and hobby store, discovers an old copy of “A Christmas Carol” among donations for a book and toy donation drive. In the book is a letter to Santa from 70 years ago and a valuable coin. Mandy sets out to find the owner of the book, letter and coin with the help of Jonah, a contractor who first came upon and donated the book. Along the way, they find clues that lead them closer to the author, and to each other, but can Mandy return everything to the book owner in time for Christmas and make her own Christmas wish come true?

programme.title: Bonanza Compilation Episodes 22, 23, 24
programme.desc: The Wild West adventures of Ben Cartwright and his sons as they run and defend their Nevada ranch while helping the surrounding community.

programme.title: Two Brothers in Trinity
programme.desc: After inheriting a land plot in a dusty place called Trinity, the antagonistic half-brothers, Lester and Jesse, reunite to pursue different aspirations, only to find themselves neck-deep in trouble. Will they ever fulfil their dreams?

programme.title: Gunfight at Red Sands
programme.desc: An avenging outsider riddles a gang of ruthless bandits in revenge for the murder of his family.

programme.title: Find a Place to Die
programme.desc: An outcast Confederate soldier redeems himself by defending a woman against bandits willing to kill for her goldmine claim.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies. She plans to sell it, but handsome caretaker Liam makes her an offer she can't refuse, and sparks fly as they work to transform the cabin into a holiday resort.

programme.title: The Decoy Bride
programme.desc: A heart-warming romantic comedy about an ordinary girl who is hired to be the decoy for the most famous bride in the world.

programme.title: A Song for Christmas
programme.desc: Two single parents stumble into the possibility of love for Christmas, only to discover that their daughters are embroiled in a rivalry at school. When the rivalry gets out of control, can hope and healing lead everyone to a peaceful and merry Christmas?

programme.title: Law of Attraction
programme.desc: A young female attorney with ambition to make partner in her law firm, falls for an opposing attorney on a big important case. Will love prevail?

programme.title: Groomzilla
programme.desc: A woman is surprised and dismayed when her fiance takes the planning of their wedding too seriously.

programme.title: Christmas Eve
programme.desc: Hilarity, romance and festive spirit prevail, when six New Yorkers get trapped in an elevator on Christmas Eve! Forcing a heartless real estate tycoon, a crass HR manager, his ex-employee and a cynical doctor to reconsider the way they think about others.

programme.title: The Accidental Husband
programme.desc: Emma Lloyd has a hit radio talk show, an impending book deal, and a loving relationship with her fiancé, Richard. Then Emma finds out that she is already married to a man she's never met before, a result of a misguided prank. With her wedding just around the corner, Emma must find the mystery man and obtain an annulment.

programme.title: Escape Plan 3: The Extractors
programme.desc: After security expert Ray Breslin is hired to rescue the kidnapped daughter of a Hong Kong tech mogul from a formidable Latvian prison, Breslin's girlfriend is also captured.

programme.title: Secret Workshops
programme.desc: A job as a seamstress tempts Juana, a young Bolivian woman, to neighbouring Argentina. Her husband and child remain behind in their homeland. It doesn't take long for the illusion of financial gain to burst – Juana is being exploited and must produce textiles for a luxury brand. Her employer's demands become ever more absurd, working conditions become unbearable. When her son becomes ill, Juana starts making plans to return, but as far as her employer is concerned, leaving is not an option.

programme.title: The Unvanquished
programme.desc: A boy leaves home to study in Calcutta, while his mother must face a life alone.

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: Romance and suspense ensue in Paris as a woman is pursued by several men who want a fortune her murdered husband had stolen. Who can she trust?

programme.title: The Pilgrim
programme.desc: The Tramp is an escaped convict who is mistaken as a pastor in a small town church.

programme.title: Il Bidone
programme.desc: Aging small-time con man Augusto, who swindles peasants, works with two younger men: Roberto, who wants to become the Italian Johnny Ray.

programme.title: Hurricane Season
programme.desc: In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, high school basketball coach Al Collins assembles students from five different Louisiana schools and leads them all the way to the state championships.

programme.title: The Man Without A Face
programme.desc: Chuck wants to leave home but can't make the grade for boarding school. Then, he finds out the disfigured recluse (Mel Gibson, "Braveheart") living nearby is an ex-teacher.

programme.title: Left Behind
programme.desc: A small group of survivors are left behind after millions of people suddenly vanish and the world is plunged into chaos and destruction.

programme.title: Heartbreakers
programme.desc: Max and Page are a brilliant mother and daughter con team who have their gift down to a fine art.

programme.title: Time Loop
programme.desc: A young Londoner scientist running experiments with his father in a quite Italian village, has to face the consequences of choices he hasn't made yet.

programme.title: Upside Down
programme.desc: Ever since Adam (Jim Sturgess) and Eden (Kirsten Dunst) fell in love as teens, their bond has faced astronomical odds. The pair are separated, not just by social class or the political system committed to keeping them apart, but also by a freak planetary condition: they live on twinned, parallel worlds with opposing gravitational forces. Years later, after suffering the pain of being torn apart, Adam decides to set out on a quest to once again find Eden and reconnect with his lost love.

programme.title: Sum of Histories
programme.desc: Two physicists discover how to manipulate electrons with quantum tunneling to send emails to the past. With the power to influence the recent past, the temptation to right old wrongs is too great.

programme.title: Errors of the Human Body
programme.desc: When a potentially lethal virus is created within his new lab, Dr Geoff Burton is shocked to discover he is not only the unwitting cause, but also its first victim.

programme.title: Hearts & Vines
programme.desc: A builder and decorator on a home renovation show end up quarantined during the holidays in the home they are renovating

programme.title: A Husband For Christmas
programme.desc: Two co-workers agree to a marriage of convenience, but an unrealized chemistry grows between them.

programme.title: Christmas on the Bayou
programme.desc: A divorced workaholic executive goes back to her home town to spend Christmas with her son and mother. Through a rekindled romance and a small miracle, she discovers where her heart truly belongs.

programme.title: Christmas Miracle
programme.desc: Due to a road closure, eight strangers must take refuge in an abandoned church during a storm.

programme.title: Love is a Piece of Cake
programme.desc: Jessie Dale is a third generation baker who loves her cake shop more than anything in the world. When developers threaten to buy her building and force her out, she must do all she can to save her bakery, all while juggling a blossoming romance with her client's brother.

programme.title: A Slice of Chicago Romance
programme.desc: In a suburb of Chicago, Romanos & Juliatos, two pizza places, have competed for the town's business for years. When both restaurants get passed down to—RILEY (30s) and SARAH (30s)—after a new pizza chain moves into town, the new bosses struggle to compete after they begin to fall for one another.

programme.title: Despite the Falling Snow
programme.desc: In 1950s Moscow, communist Katya secretly spies for the Americans in the Cold War arms race. When she lands her biggest assignment, stealing secrets from rising government star Alexander, the last thing she expects is to fall in love with him.

programme.title: Comet
programme.desc: Comet explores the six-year relationship between Dell and Kimberly, as it skips around between five pivotal moments.

programme.title: Pride
programme.desc: The determined Jim Ellis starts a swim team for troubled teens at the Philadelphia Department of Recreation.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg leads an all-star cast in the thrilling story of real-life heroes on a burning oil rig.
A man who specialises in debunking paranormal occurrences checks into fabled room 1408 in the Dolphin Hotel.

programme.title: A Christmas Horror Story
programme.desc: For some folks in the small town of Bailey Downs, Christmas turns into something much less festive.

programme.title: Saving Santa
programme.desc: Once upon a time, Santa operated with just a small workshop and a few elves. But, as Christmas has grown ever bigger, Santa has been forced to innovate! Now his cleverest elves develop amazing technology, including a hologram to hide the North Pole and a time machine to allow Santa to deliver presents to every home in the world, in just the one night. Bernard is an elf who dreams of creating such inventions, but his job is to clean the reindeer stables! Yet when he creates an amazing Christmas memory machine, his luck might be changing. But Bernard's invention is broken by a curious elf, causing the North Pole's power to fail and the hologram hiding it to disappear. Now exposed to the outside world, it is spotted by Santa's enemy, Neville Baddington, who is determined to steal Santa's secrets for himself. The only person who can stop him is Bernard.

programme.title: 12 Dogs of Christmas
programme.desc: A girl who uses dogs to teach people about the true meaning of Christmas during the Depression.

programme.title: The Magic Reindeer: The Flight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Niko the Reindeer enjoys his cool and carefree life in the Arctic, but that all changes when he is given his most surprising Christmas present ever - a little stepbrother named Jonni! Niko is unhappy about this new addition to the family, but when Jonni is kidnapped by eagles, Niko realises that it's down to him to fly off and rescue his brother!

programme.title: Christmas at the Ranch
programme.desc: When Haley Hollis returns to her family ranch, she wasn't banking on spending so much time with with ranch hand Kate - or falling for her.

programme.title: Christmas in Wonderland
programme.desc: Crooks and cops chase siblings with fake cash in Canada. Stars Matthew Knight.

programme.title: Steppin' Into the Holiday
programme.desc: Billy returns to his hometown and helps revive the town's Christmas Eve show.

programme.title: Last Chance for Christmas
programme.desc: Santa's handsome but beleaguered stable master John must rush off to Alaska.

programme.title: Christmas in Wonderland
programme.desc: Crooks and cops chase siblings with fake cash in Canada. Stars Matthew Knight.

programme.title: First Kill
programme.desc: No time off when it comes to crime! Starring Bruce Willis (Looper) and Gethin Anthony (Game of Thrones) this nail-biting, explosive thriller sees a holiday gone horribly wrong! In an attempt to reconnect with his son, Will (Haydn Christensen Jumper) takes his family to the cabin where he grew up. However, their trip takes a deadly turn when they witness the murder of a crooked police officer.

programme.title: Lapdance
programme.desc: Carmen Electra (Scary Movie) and Briana Evigan (Step Up 2: The Streets) star in this seductive thriller. provocative world of sex, drugs and money. Struggling to pay her bills, Monica (Ali Cobrin: Bad Neighbours) starts working as an exotic dancer. But once she gets a taste, she has no desire to turn back. Soon Monicas life quickly spirals out of control as betrayals and power struggles emerge.

programme.title: Forget Everything and Run
programme.desc: The Walking Dead meets The Revenant. When a virus ravages a mountain community the survivors must flee from the monsters it created into the barren wilderness. Scavenging, freezing and dying, one family will fight for their lives against marauders hellbent on revenge. As humanity clings to hope, their only chance for survival is forming an alliance with the monsters that came calling.

programme.title: Resistance: 1942
programme.desc: A tense, WWII-set cat and mouse thriller starring Cary Elwes (The Princess Bride), Greer Grammer (Awkward.), Jason Patric (Sleepers) and Oscar nominee Judd Hirsch (Independence Day). France, 1942. Under Nazi control, the Allies have been pushed off and Hitlers victory is nearly absolute. In hiding, Jacques radio broadcasts a message of hope. But a relentless Gestapo captain is out to catch him.

programme.title: Christmas Comes Home
programme.desc: A widower falls for his son's physical rehabilitation specialist.

programme.title: Christmas with a Prince: The Royal Baby
programme.desc: Things get complicated for the expecting Prince Alexander and Dr. Tasha when a Royal State Visit is planned abroad where they must struggle with defying tradition. Starring Kaitlyn Leeb (2021)

programme.title: Christmas at Graceland
programme.desc: A Chicago business executive travels to Memphis to secure one of the city's oldest family-owned banks where reunites with an old flame. Starring Kellie Pickler (2018)

programme.title: Christmas Next Door
programme.desc: Eric is known for being a Christmas grouch. But will his neighbour and young relatives teach him to embrace the prospect of love and the spirit of Christmas? Jesse Metcalfe stars. (2017)

programme.title: Double Holiday
programme.desc: Work rivals Rebecca and Chris are forced to collaborate when they are tasked with organising this year's holiday season office party. Stars Carly Pope and Kristoffer Polaha. (2019)

programme.title: A Christmas Recipe For Romance
programme.desc: Abby asks a renowned chef to teach her to cook ahead of a Christmas cookery competition that could save her family's historic inn. Could love be on the menu? Starring Madeline Leon. (2019)

programme.title: A Christmas To Savour
programme.desc: Scarlett, chef and co-owner of a restaurant, is bereft of inspiration for her Christmas menu. Will a trip to a cooking retreat reignite her passion for work and romance? Stars Britt Irvin (2021)

programme.title: As Gouda As It Gets
programme.desc: Cheesemaker Brie is perfecting smoked gouda to enter the annual cheese festival. Cheese blogger Jack is writing an article on her journey. (2020)

programme.title: Baking All The Way
programme.desc: A pastry chef arrives in Wisconsin to convince a baker to give her his gingerbread recipe for her new cookbook. Starring Cory Lee (2022)

programme.title: As Gouda As It Gets
programme.desc: Cheesemaker Brie is perfecting smoked gouda to enter the annual cheese festival. Cheese blogger Jack is writing an article on her journey. (2020)

programme.title: ROME EXPRESS
programme.desc: A tense story of robbery, intrigue and murder which takes place on a trans-continental train. When a group of strangers, including thieves and blackmail victims, are thrown together aboard a train, the suspense rises.

programme.title: THIS SPORTING LIFE
programme.desc: Richard Harris gives a great performance as a man who wants to quit his job as a miner.

programme.title: ACCOUNT RENDERED
programme.desc: Robert suspects his wife is being unfaithful and decides to follow her. He sees her meet a man, but after falling unconscious, he wakes up to discover she has been murdered. But who killed her? Everyone is under suspicion in this tense thriller.

programme.title: ON THE NIGHT OF THE FIRE
programme.desc: Kobling is a barber who steals ¬£100 to pay off his wife's debt. When the police trace the stolen notes to him, and someone is killed, Kobling goes into his hiding and sends his wife and child away. Will he be able to elude the police?

programme.title: THE DARK MAN
programme.desc: A peaceful seaside village is shocked by a sudden and vicious double murder when a beautiful young actress informs the police that she may able to identify the killer.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: Paranoia
programme.desc: The world's two most powerful tech billionaires and bitter adversaries will stop at nothing to outwit and destroy each other's business empires. But when a young rising star falls between them, he becomes trapped in the middle of the rivals life-and-death game of corporate espionage.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: It is South Carolina, and the spirit of 1776 fills the air throughout the thirteen American colonies. Rebellion is brewing, taxation from the British crown is taking a toll on the American colonists, and a conflict with England is inevitable.

programme.title: District 9
programme.desc: From producer Peter Jackson and director Neill Blomkamp comes a startlingly original science-fiction thriller where alien refugees, stranded on Earth, are exiled to a slum on the fringes of Johannesburg.

programme.title: Mindhunters
programme.desc: Trainees in the FBI's psychological profiling program must put their training into practice when they discover a killer in their midst.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex-con sets out to avenge his brother's death after they were double-crossed during a heist years ago. During his campaign, however, he's tracked by a veteran cop and an egocentric hit man.

programme.title: The Shepherd
programme.desc: A texas cop battles ex-navy seals who are trying to traffic drugs from Mexico into the USA.

programme.title: Guarding Tess
programme.desc: Shirley MacClaine plays Tess Carlisle, a cantankerous, much beloved former First Lady whose husband died in office nearly a decade ago. Now, far removed from Washington, she directs her extraordinary intelligence to a battle of wills with her bodyguard, Secret Service Agent Doug Chesnic (Nicolas Cage).

programme.title: Did You Hear About The Morgans?
programme.desc: An estranged New York couple witnesses a murder and are placed in a witness-protection program in a small Wyoming town.

programme.title: Roxanne
programme.desc: Inspired by Cyrano de Bergerac, the comic story of a man with the heart of a great lover, the soul of a poet, and the nose for trouble.

programme.title: As Good As It Gets
programme.desc: A heartwarming and turbulent story of three outcasts coping with the frustrations of life in New York City. Starring Jack Nicholson as a world-weary curmudgeon and Greg Kinnear as a gay artist who share a living space in the same building with Helen Hunt, the waitress who changes both their lives. AS GOOD AS IT GETS also stars Academy Award-winner Cuba Gooding, Jr.

programme.title: Meek's Cutoff
programme.desc: In this acclaimed Western, travelling settlers find themselves stranded in harsh conditions and begin to turn upon each other.

programme.title: Love and Honor
programme.desc: While fighting in Vietnam, Dalton hears his girlfriend back home has dumped him. He has a week's leave coming up so decides to fly to get her back. AWOL from the war zone, he has seven days to get back to the US, change his girlfriend's mind and make it back to Vietnam without anyone noticing.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: Ex-felon, Eugene Brown, establishes a Chess Club for inner city teenagers in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: The Fifth Estate
programme.desc: Driven to expose corporate crimes and government secrets no matter what the cost, an activist and computer hacker team up to become the underground watchdogs of the privileged and powerful.

programme.title: White Vengeance
programme.desc: White Vengeance tells the story of two brothers contending for supremacy during the fall of the Qin Dynasty, which ruled Imperial China from 221 to 206 BC. As rebels rose, the nation fell into chaos.

programme.title: Deadly Inferno
programme.desc: During some extensive renovations on an eight-storey office building, a major gas leak leads to a terrible explosion, trapping the injured staff in a fiery maze. Can the brave firefighters provide a safe exit from this deadly inferno?

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: In a future where time is literally money and aging stops at 25, the only way to stay alive is to earn, steal, or inherit more time.

programme.title: Last Looks
programme.desc: Last Looks is a pacy and star-studded homicide mystery set in the heart of Hollywood. Alistair Pinch (Mel Gibson), is an eccentric but successful actor who spends his days drunk living the high-life in Hollywood. When his wife is found dead he becomes the prime suspect in her murder.

programme.title: Mehek
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Dholi Beats
programme.desc: The story revolves around Geet, a young woman who follows her father's footsteps as a dhol player, challenging societal norms about gender roles in music. Her journey is supported by her husband, Malhar, who helps her pursue her dreams.

programme.title: King of Hearts
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Second Chances
programme.desc: Yash, a rich and esteemed business tycoon, yearns for real love. While he falls in love with Neha, the journey ahead is not going to be an easy one for him. Will he be able to win Nehas heart?

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: This is Fate
programme.desc: Arjun spends time with Preeta and the Aroras. When he returns home, Anjali overhears him confessing his feelings for Preeta alone in the car.

programme.title: Trinayani
programme.desc: Trinayani is a woman who can see the future. She decides to use her power to make other peoples lives better. How will things turn out for her when people learn about her extraordinary abilities?

programme.title: The Good Son
programme.desc: Raja Beta is an Indian television drama series that revolves around the life of Vedant Tripathi, an ideal and dutiful son. Vedant is adopted by the Tripathi family and grows up to become a successful gynecologist. Despite facing challenges and prejudice due to his adopted status, he wins the love and respect of his family through his unwavering dedication, kindness, and sense of responsibility.
